claims.headline: Supports heart recovery
claims.notesSentence: Activates integrin-linked kinase, promoting cardiomyocyte migration, survival, and tissue repair after cardiac injury.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Thymosin β-4 cardiac repair study on PubMed

claims.headline: Faster tissue repair
claims.notesSentence: Reviewed across studies as an actin-sequestering peptide that accelerates repair of skin, cornea, and heart tissue.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Thymosin β-4 tissue repair review on PubMed

claims.headline: Promotes hair regrowth
claims.notesSentence: Stimulates hair growth via stem-cell migration in follicular bulge regions in murine studies.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Thymosin β-4 hair growth study on PubMed

claims.headline: Eases inflammation
claims.notesSentence: Suppresses NF-κB-driven inflammatory mediators and accelerates dermal wound closure in animal trials.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Thymosin β-4 anti-inflammatory study on PubMed

claims.headline: Skin & eye-surface healing
claims.notesSentence: Accelerated re-epithelialization and reduced inflammation in preclinical and clinical corneal-injury studies.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Thymosin β-4 corneal healing study on PubMed
